memory.summary: I planned to finish my assignment analysis before reading, but my cohort is inviting me to lunch now.
I made good progress on my assignment before lunch, but I need to balance this with joining my cohort for the meal they are ordering soon.
My analysis deadline has passed with the section at 79% completion, meaning I missed the target despite recent progress.
I spent 1.5 hours pushing my analysis from 79% to 86%, but I still missed the deadline despite this recent progress.
I spent 1.5 hours improving my assignment's analysis, but the assigned reading deadline passed earlier today with zero progress.
Despite working 1.5 hours to raise my analysis progress to 95%, I still missed the deadline and am now low on energy with high stress.
I improved the analysis to 98%, but I am exhausted and still haven't addressed the missed reading deadline.
My course assignment analysis is complete, but I still have high stress and sleep debt while ignoring the missed reading deadline.
I spent 1.5 hours on assigned reading with minimal progress, worsening my exhaustion and stress while ignoring the missed deadline.
The course assignment analysis is now complete, but I remain exhausted with high stress and an unresolved missed reading deadline.
I worked two more hours on the reading, moving progress from 0.10 to 0.16, yet my exhaustion and stress remain critically high.
The analysis section is now complete, but my exhaustion and stress remain critically high due to accumulated sleep debt and a missed reading deadline.
